Function to update the disconnect time when a Bluetooth Classic disconnection occurs.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a single function, [`reconnect_android_update_disconnect_time`](<#reconnect_android_update_disconnect_time>), which should be called when a Bluetooth Classic disconnection event occurs. The function is likely intended to update or log the time of disconnection, although the specific implementation details are not provided in this file.
